message:
test(proptest): expand proptest_kalman_watchdog from 9 to 22 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add serde roundtrip tests for AdaptiveWatchdogConfig, HealthClassification,
AdaptiveHealthReport, and ComponentClassification. Add behavioral properties
for observation_count tracking, estimated_interval availability, tracker reset,
std_dev/variance relationship, constant signal variance decrease, watchdog
health report structure, overall worst-component, deterministic ordering,
and reset-all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
